prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ca8de6ea`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `ca8de6ea` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ca8de6ea/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ca8de6ea/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ca8de6ea/generator.py#L1), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ca8de6ea/notes.md#L1). The rule is: take the fixed 5x5 diagonal/corner pattern and pack those nine occupied positions into the corresponding 3x3 diamond, with the true latent distribution being five distinct colors arranged as symmetric pairs plus a center color.

The summary hint was only used as a rough spatial hint and discarded for generation guidance. Both summaries miss the key distribution fact that the official examples use mirrored color pairs rather than nine independently chosen nonzero cells; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ca8de6ea/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed.

Verification passed:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task ca8de6ea` -> `4/4` official examples passed
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task ca8de6ea --n-examples 1000` -> built successfully
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task ca8de6ea` -> `1000/1000` generated examples passed

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ca8de6ea/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ca8de6ea/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ca8de6ea/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ca8de6ea/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ca8de6ea/previews/preview_03.png). I also spot-checked the generated preview asset after build; it was populated and structurally consistent with the intended 5x5-to-3x3 family.
